hasOccupation.description: Launched toll payment capturing 2% of all Iranian highway transactions. 80% pedestrian bounce reduction via voice navigation. Transformed 18-engineer team, halved ship time.
810% ROI, 3,000+ users across Iran, Russia, Eastern Europe. 1.5PB monthly traffic, zero-maintenance architecture. Full stack: network, encryption, payments, infra.
300% checkout conversion via 5→3 step optimization. 27% overall conversion uplift with dual CTA strategy. Led full marketplace redesign in multilingual environment.
2x driver acceptance via in-cab UX field research. Dynamic return-trip pricing algorithm design. Contributed to successful Series A (IRR 8B).
Shipped Ario gaming platform (Steam competitor) in 12 months. Delivered Tapeligh ad-tech platform on aggressive timeline. Led in English-primary international environment.

philosophy: I don't design interfaces. I design decisions. Every design decision connects to a business metric. I lead without authority, build with engineers not above them, and believe the best product decisions come from the gap between what users say and what they actually do.
availability: Available for senior product leadership roles, consulting engagements, and advisory positions.
